Cat & Dog and the Rain Elke Leisink René Leisink
Cat and Dog sleep. Cat and Dog sleep in a house.
You can see the moon. You can see the stars. The moon and the stars are in the sky.
Then the sun comes up. Cat and Dog look through the window. Cat and Dog see the sun.
Cat and Dog go to school with their bags.
Then one cloud comes. Then two clouds come.
Cat and Dog see the clouds. Cat and Dog cannot see the sun. Then the rain comes. The rain comes from the clouds. The rain falls on Cat and Dog. The rain falls on their bags.
Cat and Dog cry. Then, Elephant comes by.
Elephant hears Cat and Dog. Elephant sees the rain. Elephant has an umbrella.
Elephant gives the umbrella to Cat and Dog.
Cat smiles. Dog smiles. Cat and Dog give Elephant a kiss.
Cat and Dog and Elephant walk to school. They walk to school through the rain under the umbrella.
Bye-bye, Cat. Bye-bye, Dog. Bye-bye, Elephant.
